notes: 2026-05-14: Task 3/10: Added 5 unit tests to layout.rs — PR #79 (branch repo-assist/improve-layout-tests). Tests cover: flex_row_gap_spaces_children, flex_grow_expands_child_to_fill_parent, clear_allows_engine_reuse, justify_content_space_between_pushes_children_to_edges, layout_returns_relative_position_layout_bounds_returns_absolute. Pure Taffy tests, no text measurement needed for most. Build fails on Linux due to known fontconfig infrastructure issue (TextContext::new() requirement); should pass on macOS CI. Task 11: Updated May 2026 monthly summary issue #67. Next run priorities: task_2_fix_prs (2026-05-01 oldest — verify no new bug issues), task_7_labels (2026-05-09), task_1_triage (2026-05-11). Test coverage status: hit_tree.rs (24 tests), context.rs (9), focus.rs (14), text_state.rs (many - 2286 lines), layout.rs (7+5=12), scene.rs (pending PR #77), renderer.rs (pending PR #78), accessibility.rs (11+), geometry.rs (many + PR #76). Next improvement candidates: (a) view memoization design (no open PR); (b) CONTRIBUTING.md — PR #17 was closed, investigate why before retrying; (c) spool tasks blocked — most need unmerged PRs.

dep_audit_2026_04_26.notes: Verified 2026-05-07: still same versions as 2026-04-26 audit. No urgent updates needed.

files_changed: crates/motif_core/src/geometry.rs (impl Edges<f32> with inset_rect/expand_rect + 7 TDD tests)
geometry_edges_rect_utils_pr_2026_05_11.approach: inset_rect shrinks Rect by edge values (shifts origin right/down, clamps width/height to 0.0); expand_rect grows Rect by edge values (shifts origin left/up, increases size). Both use existing horizontal()/vertical() helpers. Tests: uniform, asymmetric, offset-origin, clamp-to-zero, expand-uniform, expand-asymmetric, roundtrip.

files_changed: crates/motif_core/src/scene.rs (19 unit tests: 5 Quad, 5 TextRun, 9 Scene)
scene_tests_pr_2026_05_12.approach: Tests cover: Quad constructor defaults (border color, border widths, clip bounds, corner radii, clip mutation); TextRun constructor defaults (empty glyphs/coords), push_glyph field storage, with_normalized_coords builder, multi-glyph accumulation; Scene new/default empty, push_quad/text_run count, quads()/text_runs() slice access, clear() removes both, clear() allows reuse, multi-quad accumulation.

renderer_tests_pr_2026_05_13.approach: Tests: initial state (frames=0, quads=0), increment frame count, record quad count from scene, accumulate frames across renders, update quad count each frame, zero quads after scene.clear(). Pure Rust — no Metal deps, no new dev-deps. Uses Scene/Quad/DeviceRect already in scope.

files_changed: crates/motif_core/src/layout.rs (5 new tests extending coverage from 7 to 12)
layout_tests_pr_2026_05_14.approach: Tests cover: flex_row_gap (10px gap shifts second child to x=60), flex_grow (fill parent width=200), clear+reuse (engine.clear() then fresh layout), justify_content SpaceBetween (first at x=0, second at x=150 in 200px container), layout vs layout_bounds (relative vs absolute coords with asymmetric padding).
